# Ultrasound Wave 2 Category Pack

## Required Fields

- Manufacturer, model, variant;
- system type;
- clinical applications;
- supported probes;
- imaging modes;
- display;
- connectivity/storage;
- physical configuration.

## Required Documents

- Registration certificate;
- user manual/IFU;
- datasheet;
- probe compatibility list;
- options/software list.

## Key Characteristics

- Imaging modes;
- probe ports;
- supported transducers;
- display size;
- battery if portable;
- DICOM/connectivity;
- measurements/packages;
- dimensions and weight.

## Compatibility Requirements

- Probes/transducers;
- carts/docking;
- printers;
- ECG modules;
- software packages;
- biopsy guides.

## Common Conflicts

- Probe compatibility differs by software/version.
- Clinical packages are optional.
- Portable models have battery variants.
- Regional model names may differ.

## Review Notes

Never infer probe compatibility from family name alone.
